rationale_top3: Exceptional natural setting in the Flinders Ranges with outstanding scenic beauty and wildlife viewing opportunities (20/20) Well-maintained facilities with high cleanliness standards across amenities blocks and campground areas (13/15) Good overall value for money considering the premium location and quality of facilities provided (12/15)
rationale_honourable: Strong location score reflecting convenient access to Flinders Ranges attractions and walking trails, plus adequate site sizes for various camping setups
water_fun: No swimming pool or water play facilities - focus is on natural attractions
kids_play: Minimal structured play equipment - entertainment comes from exploring the natural environment
pet_detail: No evidence of pet-friendly facilities based on zero pet score
